description: Produce a comprehensive platform audit report documenting all findings across 10 categories with severity levels and actionable recommendations
steps: Create the audit report markdown file at .agents/tasks/task-platform-audit/AUDIT-REPORT.md
Document all security vulnerabilities found during analysis
Document missing features or incomplete implementations
Include severity rating (critical/high/medium/low) for each finding
Include actionable recommendations for each finding
acceptance_criteria: All 10 audit categories are covered with specific findings grounded in actual code
Each finding has a severity level and actionable recommendation
Findings reference specific file paths and line patterns from the codebase
verification: Confirm the audit report file exists and is well-structured markdown
Confirm all 10 categories from the user request are addressed
